_note: DEATH-BY-HP-WRITE TEST (docs/modding/07 Test 1b, next-gate step 2). Decides whether writing HP=0 alone kills, or leaves a 'zombie' at 0 HP. REQUIRES the weapon neuter data mod deployed (mod/fftivc.generic.chronicle, deploy.ps1) so vanilla physical attacks are non-lethal. Steps: control a unit holding a (now neutered) weapon and attack an ENEMY. Vanilla deals ~PA (tiny); the reconciler then forces that foe's HP to 0 (FinalDamageFormula=9999 -> desiredHp clamps to 0). WATCH THE ENEMY: does it DIE (KO/collapse/removed) or ZOMBIE (keeps standing/acting at 0 HP)? AffectAllies=false so your own units are never zeroed. If it ZOMBIES, we need DeathStateWrites from the capture profile; set CauseDeathOnZeroHp=true and fill DeathStateWrites, then retest.

DeathStateWrites._comment: EXAMPLE ONLY - disabled until the offset is found via the capture profile. Once known, e.g. set the KO status bit: { "Name": "KO", "Offset": 144, "Width": "Byte", "OrMask": 1 }, and set CauseDeathOnZeroHp=true.
DeathStateWrites.Name: example-disabled
